## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New subcommand or feature
- [ ] Breaking change (schema or CLI interface change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this. At minimum: which subcommand(s) you ran and what the output looked like -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal data committed (tenant URLs, email addresses, Exchange IDs, meeting subjects, sender names)
- [ ] Tested against a live Outlook session
- [ ] `node --test test/*.test.js` passes
- [ ] `SKILL.md` updated (if subcommand added or changed)
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if subcommand added or changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
